commitMessage: feat: resolve repos from project API instead of hardcoded REPO_MAP (BOT-02)

content.summary: Container App Job triggered by ideas-api. Clones the target repository, performs a pre-flight clarity check, then runs an AI-driven tool-use loop to implement the requested feature. Commits the result and opens a draft pull request on GitHub. The job scales to zero between invocations.
content.description: A containerised Python agent that autonomously implements feature ideas. Triggered on demand by ideas-api, it clones the target repo, runs a GPT-4o tool-use loop to read/write files and execute shell commands, commits the result, and opens a draft pull request.
features: Structured logging via shared-logging library for consistent log formatting and metadata
Enhanced error logging with detailed context, including endpoint, method, error type, and stack trace
Pre-flight clarity check to assess idea implementability and request clarification if needed
Prior updates thread injected into agent context for continuity on re-trigger
Branch name and PR title include model slug for A/B comparison

architecture.overview: A containerised Python agent that autonomously implements feature ideas. Triggered on demand by ideas-api, it clones the target repo, performs a pre-flight clarity check, runs an AI-driven tool-use loop to read/write files and execute shell commands, commits the result, and opens a draft pull request.
keyPoints: Fresh container per invocation — no shared state between runs
GitHub PAT stored as a Container App secret (not an environment variable in the image)
Pre-flight clarity check posts bot comments and pauses execution if the idea is too vague
GPT-4o tool-use loop has a hard iteration cap to prevent runaway API cost
Shell execution tool runs in a sandboxed subprocess within the container
Prior updates thread injected into agent context for continuity on re-trigger
Branch name and PR title include model slug for A/B comparison
Job is triggered via az containerapp job start by ideas-api using Managed Identity
Structured logging implemented via shared-logging library for consistent and enriched log metadata

dataFlow.label: Container App Job starts — fresh container
Pre-flight clarity check · request clarification if needed
Clone target repo · read idea description
sublines: read files · write files · run shell commands

dataFlow.label: Commit changes · open draft PR on GitHub
